steps.title: Find the table match
steps.content: The example needs the location where sticky catchfly appears as the neighboring species with common cow-wheat as the target species. The right location must match both species in the table.

steps.title: Reject mismatched rows
steps.content: A pairs different species, and B pairs Virginia spring beauty with star chickweed. C does not appear as the relevant table location. The matching row lists sticky catchfly with common cow-wheat. The answer is D.
